title: SpaceX passes Amazon as valuation balloons to $2.7T
summary: SpaceX's valuation has reached $2.7 trillion, surpassing Amazon, after gaining $1 trillion since shares began trading on Friday. This represents a significant milestone for the company following its recent public market debut.
content: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

zh.title: SpaceX估值膨胀至2.7万亿美元，超越亚马逊
zh.summary: SpaceX的估值已达到2.7万亿美元，超越了亚马逊。该公司自周五股票开始交易以来增长了1万亿美元。这代表了该公司在最近上市后的重要里程碑。

title: The new PopSockets grip is so thin you’ll forget it’s even there
summary: PopSockets has launched its thinnest phone grip yet at 2.6mm thick, the Low-Pro Grip, which surpasses competing thin phone grips and is available exclusively through Apple starting today. The grip combines minimal thickness with improved functionality and comfort compared to competing products.
content:
The PopSockets Low-Pro Grip is 2.6mm thick when collapsed.	

If you had asked me a week ago to recommend a thinner alternative to PopSockets’ magnetic phone grips, I would have told you to buy the OhSnap Snap Grip 5. Ask me now and I’ll redirect you right back to the company that accidentally invented the phone grip in 2012 when trying to come up with a better way to wrangle Apple EarPods. PopSockets’ new Low-Pro is its slimmest phone grip yet, and it’s not only thinner than OhSnap’s latest, it’s also more functional and more comfortable to hold.
Available starting today exclusively through Apple in four colors (it will be available from PopSockets’ online store and other retailers starting on July 29th), the $39.99 Low-Pro Grip is launching at the same price as the Snap Grip 5. I’ve been a devoted fan of OhSnap’s grips for the past few years and recently upgraded to the Grip 5, but after testing the PopSockets Low-Pro for just a week, I’m ready to jump ship.
The last PopSockets grip I used was the Kick-Out Grip and Stand that debuted last year and did a better job than the OhSnap Grip 4 as a phone stand that worked well in both portrait and landscape mode. But at 7mm thick when collapsed, I found the Kick-Out Grip would occasionally get snagged when slipping my phone into my pocket. I’ve never had that problem with either the 2.5mm-thick Snap Grip 4 or the 3mm-thick Grip 5.
The new PopSockets Low-Pro falls somewhere between OhSnap’s last two offerings at 2.6mm, which the company compares to the thickness of a pair of dimes or a toothpick. It’s definitely thin, but you have to look incredibly close to see the height difference when comparing the Low-Pro and Snap Grip 5 side by side. If you were going by touch alone the difference in thickness is imperceivable.




Far more noticeable is how the two grips feel between your fingers when you’re holding your phone. The Snap Grip 5 carries forward a design that uses a set of interlocking flexible arms that attach the bas

zh.title: 新款PopSockets手机握持器薄到你都会忘记它的存在
zh.summary: PopSockets推出了其迄今为止最薄的手机握持器——厚度仅为2.6毫米的Low-Pro Grip，超越了竞争产品，并从今天开始独家通过Apple销售。这款握持器将最小厚度与改进的功能和舒适度结合，优于竞争产品。

title: Probably raises $9M to build a more reliable kind of AI
summary: Probably has raised $9 million to develop AI systems that prevent hallucinations and factual errors from reaching users. The company aims to achieve accuracy levels comparable to deterministic systems.
content: Probably wants to prevent hallucinations and factual errors from reaching users, and achieve accuracy on par with deterministic systems.

zh.title: Probably融资900万美元以开发更可靠的AI
zh.summary: Probably融资900万美元以开发AI系统，防止幻觉和事实错误影响用户。该公司的目标是达到与确定性系统相当的准确度水平。

title: The Microsoft Surface Laptop 8 and Surface Pro 12 now come with Snapdragon X2 chips
summary: Microsoft has launched new Surface Laptop 8 and Surface Pro 12 models featuring upgraded Snapdragon X2 processors, continuing the company's Copilot Plus PC initiative with Windows on Arm. The devices are available today in multiple configurations and sizes starting at $1,499.
content:
Microsoft is launching new Surface Laptops and a Surface Pro with Qualcomm Snapdragon X2 processors. These are direct follow-ups to the Surface Laptops and Surface Pro from 2024 that launched with Snapdragon X1 chips and jumpstarted Microsoft's Copilot Plus PC initiative with Windows on Arm. 
The new X2 Surfaces are available today. The Surface Pro 12th Edition convertible tablet comes in a 13-inch size with 10-core X2 Plus and 12-core X2 Elite chips, while the Surface Laptop 8th Edition is available in 13.8-inch and 15-inch sizes, each offering the same X2 Plus / X2 Elite configurations. The Pro starts at $1,499 with 256GB of storage (befo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软 Surface Laptop 8 和 Surface Pro 12 现已搭载骁龙 X2 芯片
zh.summary: 微软推出了新款 Surface Laptop 8 和 Surface Pro 12 型号，搭载升级的骁龙 X2 处理器，继续推进公司的 Copilot Plus PC 计划，采用 Windows on Arm。这些设备今天起可供购买，提供多种配置和尺寸选择，起价为 $1,499。

title: Comcast Xfinity adds same-day delivery to get you online immediately
summary: Comcast is introducing same-day delivery of Xfinity Gateway router equipment for new internet customers in nearly 20 markets including Atlanta, Chicago, and San Francisco. Eligible customers can receive and set up their equipment the same day they order service.
content:
Your new Xfinity router can now be delivered to your doorstep within hours of signing up. | Image: Comcast	

Comcast is launching a same-day Xfinity Wi-Fi offering that spares you from waiting for your new router. Starting today, new Xfinity customers in almost 20 markets - including Atlanta, Chicago, Denver, Houston, Nashville, Philadelphia, San Francisco, and more - can receive the Xfinity Gateway equipment they need to get online the same day they order it.
Eligible customers can select same-day Gateway router delivery during checkout after signing up for Xfinity internet services and have the equipment sent to their door "within hours," according to Comcast. Customers can then set up the devices themselves to activate the service through the X …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 康卡斯特 Xfinity 推出同日送达服务让您立即上网
zh.summary: 康卡斯特为新互联网客户推出 Xfinity Gateway 路由器设备同日送达服务，覆盖亚特兰大、芝加哥和旧金山等近 20 个市场。符合条件的客户可以在订购服务的同一天接收和设置设备。

title: Schlage’s UWB-enabled smart lock launches this month
summary: Schlage is launching its Sense Pro smart deadbolt lock on June 29th, featuring ultra wideband technology that allows users to unlock doors by approaching with a compatible Apple device. The $399 lock uses Schlage's proprietary Converge technology to calculate motion and trajectory for hands-free entry.
content:
It's been more than a year since Schlage announced its first smart lock to support ultra wideband technology (UWB), but now it's finally almost available to purchase. Starting June 29th, the Schlage Sense Pro deadbolt lock will be available for $399 in the US, allowing customers to unlock their doors by simply approaching them with a supported device, instead of using keys or biometric scans.
The Sense Pro was first announced at CES 2025. It uses Schlage's proprietary Converge technology for UWB, which requires a home key on a compatible iPhone or Apple Watch to calculate your speed, trajectory, and motion to unlock the door as you arrive.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 施莱格的超宽带智能锁本月上市
zh.summary: 施莱格将在 6 月 29 日推出其 Sense Pro 智能门栓锁，采用超宽带技术，允许用户通过携带兼容的苹果设备接近来解锁门。这款 $399 的锁采用施莱格专有的 Converge 技术来计算运动和轨迹以实现免提进入。

title: These mechanical keyboards are two very different sides of the same beautifully made coin
summary: Two exceptionally well-designed mechanical keyboards—the Evoworks Evo75 with loud, low-pitched typing and the Dry Studio ATM98 with silent switches and RGB features—represent standout craftsmanship in the mechanical keyboard market. Both keyboards demonstrate that premium design comes in contrasting styles.
content:
Most mechanical keyboards are great these days, with colorful looks and satisfying typing sounds - even in budget-friendly ranges. But every so often, one stops me dead in my tracks. In this case, two of them. 
I've been testing a pair of jaw-droppingly lovely keyboards that launched late last year. The Evoworks Evo75, a compact 75-percent layout with loud, low-pitched typing sounds. And the Dry Studio ATM98, an 1800-layout / 98-percent layout with silent switches and a design that's anything but quiet - complete with an enormous RGB-ified rotary dial. They are easily two of the nicest keyboards I've ever seen, heard, and used. And they're  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这两款机械键盘是同一枚精心打磨硬币的两个截然不同的侧面
zh.summary: 两款设计卓越的机械键盘——Evoworks Evo75具有响亮、低沉的打字音，Dry Studio ATM98则配备静音开关和RGB功能——代表了机械键盘市场中杰出的工艺。这两款键盘都展示了高端设计可以采用截然不同的风格。

title: Apple’s smart home camera service is starting to impress me
summary: Apple's HomeKit Secure Video is receiving AI-powered improvements including more descriptive alerts and natural language search capabilities for video footage, along with better notifications and energy reporting features. The upgrades will be publicly available this fall following their WWDC announcement.
content:
New features are coming to cameras connected to Apple’s HomeKit Secure Video. | ﻿Image: The Verge, Getty Images	

Apple's HomeKit Secure Video service is getting in on the Apple Intelligence party to bring more descriptive alerts from your connected cameras and let you search footage using natural language. The Apple Home app is also getting better notifications powered by AI and is finally adding support for energy reporting.
These improvements were announced at WWDC last week and will be publicly available this fall. I've been playing with some of the features in the developer betas for iOS 27 and tvOS 27 for a few days, and based on my first impressions, Apple's HomeKit Secure Video is much improved - enough to put it back in contention for me as a  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果的智能家居摄像头服务开始令我印象深刻
zh.summary: 苹果的HomeKit Secure Video正在获得AI驱动的改进，包括更详细的警报和视频素材的自然语言搜索功能，以及更好的通知和能耗报告功能。这些升级将在今年秋天WWDC发布后向公众推出。

title: SpaceX is officially buying Cursor for $60 billion
summary: SpaceX is acquiring Cursor, a programming platform, for $60 billion following its recent IPO, a strategic move to strengthen enterprise offerings and compete with AI leaders like Anthropic and OpenAI. The deal is expected to close in the third quarter of 2026.
content:
Days after its massive IPO, SpaceX says it is spending $60 billion to buy Cursor - a bet designed to help Elon Musk's sprawling rocket / AI / social media behemoth win over lucrative enterprise customers and close the gap with AI rivals like Anthropic and OpenAI.
The takeover was not entirely unexpected: SpaceX announced a peculiar arrangement in April in which it agreed to either acquire the programming platform for $60 billion or pay a $10 billion breakup fee. The company had been holding off completing the deal while going public. 
In an SEC filing, SpaceX said it expects the deal to close during the third quarter of 2026. 
Musk has pr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: SpaceX正式宣布以600亿美元收购Cursor
zh.summary: SpaceX正在以600亿美元收购编程平台Cursor。在其最近IPO之后，这一战略举措旨在加强企业产品并与Anthropic和OpenAI等AI领导者竞争。该交易预计将在2026年第三季度完成。

title: India orders temporary ban on Telegram over exam fraud concerns
summary: India has imposed a temporary ban on Telegram lasting until June 22 due to concerns about the platform's role in exam fraud. The restrictions also require disabling the app's message editing feature.
content: The restrictions include a nationwide ban on Telegram until June 22 and a requirement to disable the app's message editing feature.

zh.title: 印度因考试舞弊问题临时禁用电报
zh.summary: 印度因担心该平台在考试舞弊中的作用,实施了一项临时禁令,有效期至6月22日。限制措施还要求禁用该应用的消息编辑功能。

title: Apple’s weird anti-nausea dots cured my car sickness
summary: Apple's Vehicle Motion Cues, introduced in 2024, use an iPhone, iPad, or MacBook's accelerometer and gyroscope to reduce motion sickness when using devices in moving vehicles. The feature has proven effective at eliminating car sickness for users.
content:
I'll just work from the car, I thought. But after a few minutes of staring at my screen on quick mountain switchbacks I could feel the first signs of cold, coagulated nausea bubbling up from that sweaty place in my gut. I looked to the horizon for relief, but nothing helped… until I remembered Apple's magic dots. 
Introduced in 2024, Apple's Vehicle Motion Cues promise to tap into your device's accelerometer and gyroscope to reduce or, in my case, even eliminate the motion sickness felt when trying to use an iPhone, iPad, or MacBook inside a moving vehicle.
According to big-S Science, this type of vehicle motion sickness is caused by the e …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果奇异的防晕点治愈了我的晕车症
zh.summary: 苹果2024年推出的车辆动作提示功能利用iPhone、iPad或MacBook的加速度计和陀螺仪,在移动车辆中使用设备时减少晕动症。该功能已被证明能有效消除用户的晕车症状。

title: This startup’s super metals could soon be in military drones, luxury watches, and chef’s knives
summary: Foundation Alloy has raised $22 million to scale production of its innovative alloys, which are created through a mechanical beating process rather than traditional heating. The startup's materials are positioned for use in military drones, luxury watches, and high-end chef's knives.
content: Instead of heating metals, Foundation Alloy beats them into submission. The startup has raised $22 million to scale up production of its alloys.

zh.title: 这家初创公司的超级金属可能很快出现在军用无人机、奢侈手表和厨师刀具中
zh.summary: Foundation Alloy筹集了2200万美元来扩大其创新合金的生产,这些合金通过机械击打工艺而非传统加热工艺制造。该初创公司的材料定位用于军用无人机、奢侈手表和高端厨师刀具。

title: SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B in stock, days after blockbuster IPO
summary: SpaceX is acquiring Cursor for $60 billion in stock just days after its blockbuster IPO, a deal intended to bolster its struggling AI division. The acquisition reflects SpaceX's positioning of a $26 trillion addressable market in AI to IPO investors.
content: The deal is supposed to help SpaceX's struggling AI division. The company told IPO investors it sees a $26 trillion addressable market in AI.

zh.title: SpaceX以60亿美元收购Cursor，IPO数天后宣布
zh.summary: SpaceX以60亿美元股票收购Cursor，交易发生在其IPO数天后，旨在加强其陷入困境的AI部门。此次收购反映了SpaceX向IPO投资者宣传的26万亿美元AI市场规模。

title: Critical Copilot vulnerability allowed hackers to seal 2FA code from users
summary: A critical vulnerability in Copilot, called SearchLeak, allowed hackers to steal two-factor authentication codes from users. The exploit highlights systemic security failures in how the industry approaches large language model security.
content: SearchLeak exploit shows why the industry's approach to LLM security fails over and over.

zh.title: Copilot关键漏洞允许黑客窃取用户2FA代码
zh.summary: Copilot中被称为SearchLeak的关键漏洞允许黑客窃取用户的两步验证码。这一漏洞突显了业界在大型语言模型安全方面的系统性失败。

title: Lenovo’s next tablet has a thick speaker bump and an upgraded kickstand
summary: Lenovo has announced the Tab Plus Gen 2 tablet, featuring nine built-in speakers with a 22.7mm rear speaker bump that now includes an integrated 360-degree fold-out kickstand. The upgraded tablet emphasizes audio quality and improved multi-angle support.
content:
A large speaker bump on the back of the Tab Plus Gen 2 contributes to the tablet’s upgraded sound. | Photo: Sean Hollister / The Verge	

Lenovo announced a new version of its chonky speaker-filled Tab Plus tablet that once again puts a strong focus on audio. While the original Tab Plus launched two years ago with eight built-in speakers requiring a 13.58mm rear bulge to squeeze them all in, the new Tab Plus Gen 2 bumps that to nine speakers with a circular bump on the back that's now 22.7mm thick. To help justify the thicker addition, the Gen 2's speaker bump integrates a fold-out kickstand that rotates 360 degrees to support the tablet in portrait and landscape modes.
Lenovo hasn't confirmed exactly where or when the Tab Plus Gen 2 is expected to launch, but it says it will …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 联想下一代平板电脑采用厚重扬声器模块和升级支架
zh.summary: 联想宣布推出Tab Plus Gen 2平板电脑，配备9个内置扬声器，拥有22.7毫米后置扬声器凸起，现已集成360度可折叠支架。升级后的平板电脑强调音质和多角度支持能力。

title: Malaysia’s AI agent-powered messaging app Respond.io raises $62.5M, eyes acquisitions
summary: Respond.io, a Malaysian AI-powered customer service platform, raised $62.5M and plans acquisitions as it scales its technology for handling high-volume customer inquiries. The company's per-conversation pricing model represents a distinct approach in the AI customer service space.
content: Respond.io, one of Malaysia startups to watch, uses AI agents to handle high volumes of customer inquiries and charges per convo, not per seat.

zh.title: 马来西亚AI代理驱动的消息应用Respond.io融资6250万美元，谋求收购
zh.summary: Respond.io是一个马来西亚AI驱动的客户服务平台，融资了6250万美元，并计划通过收购来扩展其处理大量客户询问的技术。该公司的按对话付费定价模式代表了AI客户服务领域的一种独特方法。

title: Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5
summary: Anthropic received a US export control directive requiring suspension of Mythos 5 and Fable 5 model access by foreign nationals, forcing the company to disable recently launched products. The regulatory action prompted Anthropic to appeal directly to US officials, highlighting emerging government restrictions on AI model distribution.
content:
As the rest of the country celebrated the USA's first World Cup win and the New York Knicks championship, Anthropic spent its weekend fighting the Trump administration over its latest model release. At 5:21 PM on Friday, the company received a US export control directive to suspend access to its Mythos 5 and Fable 5 AI models by "any foreign national" inside or outside the US, "including foreign national Anthropic employees." The only way that was possible, Anthropic determined, was to completely disable products it spent the past week hyping - and travel to Washington, DC in hopes of changing President Donald Trump's mind. Now, over the com …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 关于Claude Mythos 5的争议内幕
zh.summary: Anthropic收到美国出口管制指令，要求暂停外国国民对Mythos 5和Fable 5模型的访问，迫使该公司禁用最近推出的产品。这一监管行动促使Anthropic直接向美国官员上诉，凸显了新兴的政府对AI模型分布的限制。
